title: Teltonika RUTX11 Enterprise Dual-SIM LTE, Dual-Band WiFi 802.11ac, Bluetooth Router
description: RUTX11 is the most feature rich among all the RUTX series devices. Wide range of internal hardware interfaces allows this device to be used in power hungry Industrial applications where speed and robustness is at the heart of solution. 4G (LTE) â Cat 6 DL up to 300 Mbps in sync with 4 x 1 Gbit Ethernet ports allows seamless data transfer experience Quad Core ARM Cortex A7 717 MHz CPU and 256 MBytes DDR3 RAM assures smooth VPN data acquisition. Would that be Enterprise office of power hungry Digital signage with 8k HDTV solution, RUTX11 can handle it all. In addition Bluetooth LE allows sensors to be connected directly to router, thus minimizing overall solution ecosystem
